(2, 2).title: Conclave Archive — Reading Hall
(2, 2).description: A high-ceilinged chamber lined with stone tablet-shelves, their contents arranged in sequences Jean cannot read. The stone here is a warmer, darker grey than the concourse outside — different mineral composition, or simply more carefully dressed. A low plinth at the centre is polished to a bright ring where hands have rested on it over many years. The air is noticeably still.

props.name: Stone Tablets
props.description: Dense Golemite script carved into stone tablets along the wall. The lettering is smaller and more formal than Jean has seen elsewhere in the city.
props.idle_message: Dense script is carved into stone tablets along the wall.
props.discovery_message: dense script carved into the wall tablets!
props.announce: Dense script is carved into stone tablets along the wall.
props.text: [Dense Golemite script on stone tablets. Jean cannot read most of it. At the base of the nearest slab, a single line in trade tongue has been scratched — a translation note in a different hand: 'Before stone: weight. From weight: us. The pool is the first gift.']

props.name: Archive Door
props.description: A low stone archway leads back out to the Conclave annex.
props.idle_message: The archive door leads back to the Conclave annex.
props.discovery_message: the archive door leading back to the Conclave annex!
props.announce: The archive door leads back to the Conclave annex.

(3, 2).title: Conclave Archive — Deep Stacks
(3, 2).description: Narrow aisles between floor-to-ceiling tablet racks, the upper reaches accessible only by iron handholds set into the stone. The organization follows a system Jean cannot parse — marks and sigils, not an alphabet. The tablets are well-maintained; some carry small clay seals at their bases. A sealed stone plate is mortared into the far wall at knee height.

props.name: The Grondelith Concordat
props.description: A flat stone tablet, its face engraved with dense formal script. A stamp at the top reads 'Office of Exchange' in trade tongue.
props.announce: A flat engraved stone tablet rests here.
props.text:
GRONDELITH CONCORDAT. Office of Exchange, trade-speech rendering.

Eighth Conclave. All present: agreed.

Pools: held by all. No one commands. No one takes alone. The pools feed the living. The pools take back the dead.

If pools are spoiled — infection, overflow, damage — address before all other work. All capable bodies respond.

Signatories held in Archive. Not for copying.

props.name: Sealed Stone Plate
props.description: A flat stone plate mortared into the base of the far wall, its face flush with the surrounding stone. The edge shows signs of occasional opening.
props.idle_message: A sealed stone plate is set into the base of the far wall.
props.discovery_message: a sealed stone plate set into the base of the wall!
props.announce: A sealed stone plate is set into the base of the far wall.

(2, 1).title: Conclave Archive — Relic Alcove
(2, 1).description: A small side chamber barely wide enough for two people, its walls incised with a repeating geometric border — concentric rings interrupted by radial lines, the same pattern Jean has seen on the archive door. A stone plinth stands at the centre, bare; the surface discolouration shows where something rested on it for a long time. One wall holds a deeply carved niche sealed with a fitted stone panel, its edge worn where fingers have tested it.

props.name: Carved Niche
props.description: A deep recess in the wall sealed by a fitted stone panel. The niche is carved with greater care than the surrounding alcove.
props.idle_message: A fitted stone panel seals a niche in the wall.
props.discovery_message: a fitted stone panel concealing a deep niche in the wall!
props.announce: A fitted stone panel seals a niche in the wall.
